description: README.md exists at repo root with complete local setup instructions, including the manual Supabase dashboard step to register custom_access_token_hook, documented with a note on what breaks if skipped.
steps: Verify README.md exists at repo root
Follow setup instructions from scratch — confirm app runs locally end-to-end
Confirm custom_access_token_hook registration step is present with clear instructions
Confirm README notes what silently breaks (JWT user_role claim missing) if hook step is skipped

description: Happy path and negative paths of the full invite-to-login flow are verified end-to-end on local Supabase, including JWT role claim, uninvited email rejection, and already-registered email blocked at invite creation.
steps: Supervisor creates invite; verify invited user receives magic link email
User submits OTP in SignInForm; verify handle_new_user trigger creates profiles row with correct role and full name
Verify invites row deleted after login
Verify user redirected to home with correct role-based navigation
Decode session JWT via supabaseClient.auth.getSession() and confirm user_role claim present
Attempt login with uninvited email; verify 'You haven't been invited' error shown before OTP is sent
Attempt invite creation for already-registered email; verify rejection at invite-create form
